character_buff.name: Grim-Ripper
character_buff.description: With the power of Black Reaper, ATK is increased and HP and SP are rapidly amplified. However, Max HP will decreased and items cant be used due to the Reapers Curse that comes with it.

effects: HP recovers by 5% per sec, SP recovers 30% per sec. But Max HP decreases by 15% and you cant use item.
HP recovers by 5% per sec, SP recovers 30% per sec. But Max HP decreases by 15% and you cant use item.
